name: Frappe
description: Indian open-source low-code framework and platform — maintainer of ERPNext, Frappe Cloud and Frappe HR.

seo.title: Frappe — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Frappe: Indian open-source low-code framework and platform — maintainer of ERPNext, Frappe Cloud and Frappe HR.

when_to_use: Custom low-code ERP built on Frappe Framework
Self-hosted ERPNext instance for Indian SME finance ops
HR and payroll automation with Frappe HR workflows
Building a custom business app with Frappe's doctype system
Open-source alternative to Salesforce for Indian SMBs

review.verdict: A genuinely open low-code stack — great if you can commit to the Frappe way, rough if you cant.
review.best_for: Technical teams wanting OSS ERP and business apps without vendor lock-in
review.not_for: Non-technical buyers expecting plug-and-play SaaS polish

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
